issues.description: Scanner false-negative: _is_comment_or_doc returns True for any line containing a ban-doc marker, even when the line also executes `|| true` (e.g. `cmd || true  # no || true`). Confirmed independently: scan_text returns [].
issues.recommendation: Classify comment-only lines strictly (startswith # / // / pure docstring) BEFORE applying ban-marker allowlist; never let ban prose on a code line suppress a real suppressor match.

issues.description: Mandatory path list is static and curated. Future gate scripts added to CI but not to MANDATORY_GATE_PATHS will not be scanned (false green by omission).
issues.recommendation: Either derive mandatory paths from jobs/steps in .github/workflows/ci.yml + scripts it invokes, or add a unit test that fails if ci.yml references a new scripts/* path outside the list.

issues.description: Scanner is not wired into CI / ci_gate / ci-check — DoD proof is point-in-time evidence, not continuous enforcement.
issues.recommendation: Add `python3 -m scripts.ops.scan_mandatory_gates_failclosed` as a fail-closed CI step after this DoD item is flipped (follow-up story OK).

issues.description: AIOX state file still status=Ready / qa_verdict=PENDING / gates PENDING while story markdown says InReview — operational state lag.
issues.recommendation: PO/orchestrator reconcile state after this QA artifact is accepted.

Shipped scanner + 6 tests provide executable, non-reimplemented proof for DoD §13.4 item 'Nenhum gate obrigatório usa `|| true`.'.
DoD.md checkbox for this item remains open pending this independent verdict and PO close (correct process).
forbidden_claims: Full repository is free of `|| true` (false — ops/bootstrap/backup/Makefile still use it intentionally).
Scanner is evasion-proof / continuous CI enforcement (not wired; ban-marker false-negative exists).

dod_items.rationale: Factual claim independently verified by (1) re-run scanner, (2) re-run tests, (3) manual line inspection of all mandatory paths. Residual scanner defects do not invent suppressors in current gates.
